auth.login.heroBody: Coordinate your priorities, knowledge, and decisions from one secure workspace built for focused execution.
auth.login.heroTitle: Your executive desk, ready when you are.
auth.login.point.privateBody: Keep conversations, documents, and operating context inside one protected environment.
auth.login.point.controlBody: Adjust behavior, workflows, and access with a workspace designed around your operating style.
auth.login.title: Sign in
auth.login.subtitle: Continue to your workspace and pick up where you left off.
auth.login.errorFallback: Unable to sign in. Please try again.
auth.login.metadata.title: Sign In
auth.login.metadata.description: Sign in to your See-Sweet workspace and continue with your assistant.
auth.signUp.heroBody: Set up a workspace that helps you capture context, organize moving parts, and shape how your assistant operates.
auth.signUp.heroTitle: Build the workspace around how you work.
auth.signUp.point.fastBody: Open your workspace in minutes and begin shaping the assistant around your priorities.
auth.signUp.point.organizedBody: Keep notes, tasks, and documents aligned in one structured flow.
auth.signUp.point.controlBody: Define tone, instructions, and system behavior without losing clarity or oversight.
auth.signUp.title: Create account
auth.signUp.subtitle: Create your workspace and start configuring your assistant.
auth.signUp.passwordPlaceholder: Create a password with at least 8 characters
auth.signUp.errorFallback: Unable to create your account. Please try again.
auth.signUp.metadata.title: Create Account
auth.signUp.metadata.description: Create your See-Sweet workspace and start shaping your assistant.
auth.oauthUnavailable.title: Not available right now
auth.oauthUnavailable.bodySuffix: sign-in is not available right now. Use email and password for now.
landing.metadata.title: Private Executive Secretariat
landing.metadata.description: See-Sweet gives each user a private executive secretariat for meetings, decisions, priorities, and follow-through.
landing.badge: Built for founders, executives, and focused operators
landing.title: A private AI assistant that works like your executive office.
landing.subtitle: See-Sweet helps you prepare for meetings, hold context across time, track decisions, and move work forward with the discipline of a strong chief of staff.
landing.signal.private.title: Private by design
landing.signal.private.body: Keep your operating context, conversations, and knowledge inside an authenticated personal workspace.
landing.signal.prep.title: Preparation first
landing.signal.prep.body: Turn meetings, documents, and notes into briefs, talking points, and structured follow-up.
landing.signal.followThrough.title: Follow-through built in
landing.signal.followThrough.body: Capture actions, decisions, and commitments so important work does not disappear between sessions.
landing.panel.title: Executive support, structured for one user
landing.panel.subtitle: Start with a clear promise, then move into your workspace at /home after authentication.
landing.useCase.founder.title: Founder
landing.useCase.founder.body: Prepare for investor, hiring, and board conversations while keeping strategy and follow-ups connected.
landing.useCase.executive.title: Executive
landing.useCase.executive.body: Run a daily operating desk for briefings, stakeholder context, meeting preparation, and decision support.
landing.useCase.operator.title: Consultant or solo operator
landing.useCase.operator.body: Manage multiple workstreams without losing commitments, context, or momentum between sessions.
landing.pricing.sectionSubtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.
landing.pricing.free.name: Free
landing.pricing.free.description: Everything you need to get started.
landing.pricing.pro.name: Pro
landing.pricing.pro.description: For operators who run on context.
landing.pricing.premium.name: Premium
home.title: Your executive workspace
home.description: Your private executive workspace. Stay organized, make decisions, and move work forward.
home.focusBody: Keep your context, decisions, and follow-through in one place.
onboarding.step1.title: Welcome to See-Sweet
onboarding.step1.body: Your private executive workspace. Let’s take 30 seconds to set it up.
onboarding.step2.title: Name your assistant
onboarding.step2.body: Choose what you'd like to call your assistant. You can change this any time in Settings.
onboarding.step3.title: You're all set
onboarding.step3.body: Your workspace is ready. Explore Meetings, Tasks, and the Knowledge Base to get the most out of See-Sweet.
error.global.title: Something went wrong.
error.global.body: The workspace hit an unexpected problem. Try again, or return to a stable page.
loading.workspace.title: Loading your workspace.
loading.workspace.body: Checking your session, pulling current context, and preparing the next view.
legal.placeholder.description: Review the policy information related to your workspace here.
legal.placeholder.note: Additional policy details can be published on this page over time.
legal.privacyPolicy.metadata.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacyPolicy.metadata.description: Privacy policy information for the See-Sweet workspace.
legal.privacyPolicy.title: Privacy policy
legal.privacyPolicy.body: This page explains how workspace data, meeting records, and authentication information are handled.
legal.termsOfUse.metadata.title: Terms Of Use
legal.termsOfUse.metadata.description: Terms of use information for the See-Sweet workspace.
legal.termsOfUse.title: Terms of use
legal.termsOfUse.body: This page outlines the terms governing access to the private workspace, acceptable use, and account responsibilities.
legal.security.metadata.title: Security
legal.security.metadata.description: Security information for the See-Sweet workspace.
legal.security.title: Security
legal.security.body: This page covers authentication, data boundaries, infrastructure, and incident handling expectations.
chat.metadata.title: Chat
chat.sidebar.title: Chats
chat.sidebar.limitReached: Delete a chat to create a new one
chat.sidebar.pendingEmpty: Start chatting first — empty chats are not saved.
chat.sidebar.limitNotice: 10 chat limit reached. Delete one to start a new chat.
chat.sidebar.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this chat and all its messages.
chat.empty.title: Start a conversation
chat.error.send: Failed to send message. Please try again.
chat.rename.title: Rename chat
settings.title: Settings
settings.instructions.description: Custom instructions applied to every conversation.
settings.instructions.placeholder: Always reply in bullet points. Focus on actionability.
settings.model.temperatureDesc: Controls randomness. Higher values produce more creative responses.
settings.model.topPDesc: Nucleus sampling. Lower values make output more focused.
settings.model.topKDesc: Limits the token pool per step. 0 disables the limit.
settings.model.numCtxDesc: Number of tokens the model can process at once.
settings.model.repeatPenaltyDesc: Penalizes repeated tokens. Higher values reduce repetition.
settings.language.description: Language used throughout the app and in assistant messages.
settings.llm.title: LLM Settings
appSettings.metadata.title: App Settings
appSettings.page.title: App Settings
appSettings.page.subtitle: Global application configuration.
appSettings.language.label: Display language
share.panel.title: Share Contact Card
share.panel.description: Generate a 24-hour link that shows a public contact card. Choose which fields to include.
share.field.name: Name
assistant.metadata.title: Assistant Settings
assistant.metadata.description: Customize your assistant's name and behavior.
assistant.page.title: Assistant Settings
assistant.page.subtitle: Configure the assistant's identity and default behavior.
assistant.identity.description: Name the assistant will use in every conversation.
assistant.name.label: Assistant name
assistant.behavior.description: Define how the assistant communicates and responds.
assistant.responseStyle.label: Response style
assistant.responseStyle.description: Sets the default tone and length of assistant responses.
assistant.systemPrompt.label: System prompt
assistant.systemPrompt.description: Standing instructions the assistant follows in every conversation.
assistant.systemPrompt.placeholder: Always reply in bullet points. Prioritize brevity over completeness.
knowledge.metadata.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.metadata.description: Manage your private knowledge and personal information.
knowledge.documents.emptyBody: Upload a .txt or .md file to give the assistant access to your knowledge.
knowledge.documents.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove the document and all its stored chunks.
knowledge.personalInfo.saveError: Failed to save. Please try again.
knowledge.personalInfo.emptyBody: Add your name, job, location, or any context the assistant should know about you.
knowledge.personalInfo.field.name: Full name
contacts.metadata.title: Contacts
contacts.metadata.description: Manage your professional contacts and relationships.
contacts.emptyBody: Add contacts to give the assistant context about who you work with.
contacts.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove the contact.
contacts.saveError: Failed to save contact. Please try again.
contacts.field.name: Name
contacts.interactions.label: Interaction history
meetings.metadata.title: Meetings
meetings.metadata.description: Schedule and review your meetings with context and outcomes.
meetings.emptyBody: Add meetings to track upcoming events and past outcomes.
meetings.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove the meeting record.
meetings.deleteDescriptionGoogle: This meeting was synced from Google Calendar. It will be removed from See-Sweet only — your Google Calendar event will not be affected.
meetings.saveError: Failed to save meeting. Please try again.
meetings.field.title: Title
meetings.prep.label: Meeting Prep
meetings.prep.error: Prep generation failed. Please try again.
tasks.metadata.title: Tasks
tasks.metadata.description: Track your open actions, priorities, and deadlines.
tasks.emptyBody: Add tasks to track what needs to get done.
tasks.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove the task.
tasks.saveError: Failed to save task. Please try again.
tasks.field.title: Title
reports.metadata.title: Assistant Reports
reports.metadata.description: A log of actions performed by the assistant on your behalf.
reports.title: Assistant Reports
reports.subtitle: Every time the assistant creates a contact, meeting, or task on your behalf, a brief report is recorded here.
reports.emptyBody: Reports are generated automatically when the assistant performs actions for you.
decisions.metadata.title: Decisions
decisions.metadata.description: Log key decisions with rationale, outcome, and status.
decisions.page.subtitle: Keep a record of every significant choice — why you made it, what happened, and whether it still stands. The assistant reads your open decisions and recently closed ones so it can reason with you without repeating settled ground.
decisions.emptyBody: Log decisions to give the assistant context about what you have decided and why.
decisions.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove the decision record.
decisions.saveError: Failed to save decision. Please try again.
decisions.field.title: Title
decisions.field.title.placeholder: Use TypeScript for the new service
decisions.field.outcome.placeholder: What was decided or what happened…
home.briefing.label: Today's brief
home.briefing.ai.label: AI brief
integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.description: Connect external services to sync data into your workspace.
integrations.google.title: Google Calendar
integrations.google.description: Import upcoming events from your primary Google Calendar.
integrations.google.disconnectConfirmDes: This will remove the integration and stop syncing events. You can reconnect at any time.
integrations.google.errorInvalid: OAuth state was invalid. Please try again.
integrations.google.errorFailed: Failed to connect Google Calendar. Please try again.
scheduledNotif.title: Scheduled Notifications
scheduledNotif.description: Choose which notifications the assistant sends automatically and how often.
scheduledNotif.briefing.label: Daily briefing
scheduledNotif.briefing.description: Receive an AI-generated briefing in your notification inbox.
scheduledNotif.tasksOverdue.label: Overdue task alerts
scheduledNotif.tasksOverdue.description: Get notified when tasks are past their due date.
scheduledNotif.meetingFollowup.label: Meeting follow-up
scheduledNotif.meetingFollowup.descripti: Nudge to capture notes for meetings that ended without a summary.
scheduledNotif.weeklyDigest.label: Weekly digest
scheduledNotif.weeklyDigest.description: Friday summary of meetings held, tasks closed, and decisions made.
